caption: In the video, a man in a dark suit and patterned tie stands in what appears to be an office setting, addressing two seated individuals. The man gestures with his right hand, pointing towards the person on the left, who is wearing a white shirt and tie. The woman on the right, dressed in a black top, looks down, seemingly unengaged or focused on something else. The background features a framed picture and a monitor, suggesting a professional environment. The interaction seems to involve some form of discussion or instruction, with the standing man taking a leading role in the conversation.
